zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth FitzWarren於1404年出生在英國戴文塔福斯托可時，她的父親Sir Fulk Fitzwarin15歲，母親Lady Anne Botreaux21歲。她於大約1420年與Sir Richard Hankford結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1427年在英國戴文蒙可利享年23歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文蒙可利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth FitzWarren于1404年出生在英国戴文塔福斯托可时，她的父亲Sir Fulk Fitzwarin15岁，母亲Lady Anne Botreaux21岁。她于大约1420年与Sir Richard Hankford结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1427年在英国戴文蒙可利享年23岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文蒙可利。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth FitzWarren was born in 1404, in Tawstock, Devon, England, her father, Sir Fulk Fitzwarin, was 15 and her mother, Lady Anne Botreaux, was 21. She married Sir Richard Hankford about 1420. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1427, in Monkleigh, Devon, England, at the age of 23, and was buried in Monkleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth FitzWarren est née en 1404, à Tawstock, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Fulk Fitzwarin, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Botreaux, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Hankford environ 1420. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1427, à Monkleigh, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 23 ans, et a été enterrée à Monkleigh, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth FitzWarren 1404 in Tawstock, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Fulk Fitzwarin 15 und ihre Mutter Lady Anne Botreaux 21. Sie hat um 1420 Sir Richard Hankford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1427 im Alter von 23 Jahren in Monkleigh, Devon, England und wurde in Monkleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth FitzWarren è nata il nel 1404 nel Tawstock, Devon, England, sua padre, Sir Fulk Fitzwarin, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Lady Anne Botreaux, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Hankford circa 1420. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1427, nel Monkleigh, Devon, England, all'età di 23 anni, e fu sepolta a Monkleigh, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth FitzWarrenが1404年にイギリスデボンタウストックで生まれた時，父Sir Fulk Fitzwarinは15歳，母Lady Anne Botreauxは21歳であった。約1420年にSir Richard Hankfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1427年にイギリスデボンモンクレイグで23歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンモンクレイグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth FitzWarren(이)가 1404년 영국 데폰 타w스톡에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Fulk Fitzwarin(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anne Botreaux(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1420년 Sir Richard Hankford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1427년 영국 데폰 몬클리에서 23세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 몬클리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth FitzWarren nasceu em 1404, em Tawstock, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Fulk Fitzwarin, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Botreaux, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Hankford aproximadamente 1420. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1427, em Monkleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, com 23 anos, e foi sepultada em Monkleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth FitzWarren родилась в 1404 г. в местности тавстокк, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Fulk Fitzwarin было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Botreaux, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Hankford около 1420 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1427 г. в местности монклиг, девон, Англия в возрасте 23 лет и была похоронена в местности монклиг, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth FitzWarren nació en 1404, en Tawstock, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Fulk Fitzwarin, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Lady Anne Botreaux, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Hankford aproximadamente 1420. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1427, en Monkleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 23 años, y fue sepultada en Monkleigh, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
